final:
module data_forwarding_unit (  
    input [4:0] src1,  
    input [4:0] src2,  
    input [4:0] dst,  
    input forward_src1,  
    input forward_src2,  
    output reg [4:0] out_src1,  
    output reg [4:0] out_src2  
);  
    always @(*) begin
  out_src1 = forward_src1 ? dst : src1 ;
  end

  always @(*) begin
  out_src2 = forward_src2 ? dst : src2 ;
  end  
endmodule
